name_en: Exclusive launch model: M44813 Enhanced version (Quality improved. Counter-sync electronic chip code, gift bag, protective paper, foil electronic tag, certificate). Leather is from the authentic factory, Italian Grade A leather. Authenticity lies in quality, hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, stitching, Grade A output, detailed quality control, professional QC. Authentic full set packaging. Photos match the product. Full set packaging shown in photos. Dimensions: 24x16x6CM
